codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Terjadi kesalahan. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect ke server. Please check your internet connection dan try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long ke respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection dan try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts dengan newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields dan try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Terjadi kesalahan while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect ke server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please segarkan dan try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return ke pelacakan dan try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not simpan your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment dan try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An kesalahan occurred while memuat this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid email atau kata sandi. Please check your details dan try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please pilih a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Masuk again ke lanjutkan.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid atau expired
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Tidak dapat menyimpan admission record. Periksa koneksi Anda dan coba lagi
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some wajib admission details are missing. Please tinjau highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable ke generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still tinjau dan simpan admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Tidak dapat memuat admission form. Periksa koneksi Anda dan coba lagi
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Tidak dapat menyimpan local admission draft. Please try again

disclaimer.title: Penafian
disclaimer.prototypeFraming: This app is a prototype untuk reference dan training. It is not intended untuk direct clinical use.
disclaimer.acknowledgeHint: Confirm that you have read dan understood penafian

capture.title: Dataset capture
capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted untuk reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets atau sent ke external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write peran.
capture.offlineNotice: Offline submissions are dalam antrean dengan structured fields only dan sync when connectivity returns.
capture.notePlaceholder: Paste a de-identified bedside note, then tinjau structured fields before submitting.
capture.facilityMissing: Pilih atau sign in ke one active fasilitas before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.
capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured tinjau payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed tinjau workflows.

privacy.title: Privasi
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences dan session data are stored only on this device. Tidak adathing is sent ke external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If online AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent ke configured services.

about.title: Tentang
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype untuk reference dan training. Tidak adat untuk clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support dan advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, atau determine ventilator pengaturan.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against pasien, your fasilitas workflow, dan local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Wajib before continuing ke clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device dan will be tersinkron when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Tinjau safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data dan uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible untuk pasien care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in fasilitas context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active fasilitas dan peran shown by your session. Keep records within correct fasilitas workflow dan follow local escalation, tinjau, dan approval procedures.

inputs.title: Masukkaning inputs
inputs.body: Use Rawat masuk ke masukkan available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Opsional ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing opsional data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a simpan blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations tampilkan advisory ventilator setting references dengan a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align dengan your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only dan verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Pemantauan dan alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a rekomendasi, use Pemantauan ke log vitals dan labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds dan should be assessed according ke local protocol.

offline.title: Offline behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Rawat masuk, advisory summaries, pemantauan) works offline. Data is saved locally. Opsional AI features require connectivity. When kembali online, lanjutkan as normal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume dan oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory ke expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Volume tidal (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, dan pH, tied ke a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance dan verification state untuk a reference range. Only active approved atau verified ranges are eligible untuk active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need tinjau before dataset atau training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue untuk tinjau decisions, corrections, exclusions, dan audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current offline, online, atau syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden dari normal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; masukkan SpO₂ dan lainnya vitals when available. untuk better matching, tambah PaO₂, PaCO₂, dan pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app offline
offline.body: Rawat masuk, advisory summaries, dan pemantauan work offline. Data is stored locally. Opsional AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not wajib untuk core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, tertunda, retired, rejected, dan unverified ranges are not eligible untuk active decision-support display. Tinjau source, version, scope, dan verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness bantuan is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness dan shadow-mode details are visible only ke approved governance roles. Tidak adarmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs tinjau
needsReview.body: Use tinjau queue ke check submitted data, request correction, setujui eligible records, atau kecualikan records dengan an audit alasan.

guides.home: Tinjau fasilitas context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, dan records needing tinjau before opening a pasien workflow.
guides.admit: Capture pasien pathway dan available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly dan tinjau backend-confirmed calculations after simpan.
guides.tracking: Use pelacakan ke scan recent ventilation status dan tinjau needs. Read trend flags dengan source data dan local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture untuk de-identified candidate records. Human tinjau is wajib before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use tinjau queue ke setujui, request correction, atau kecualikan records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards untuk aggregate quality, tinjau, reference, dan governance status. Avoid pasien identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use pengaturan untuk akun, fasilitas, accessibility, privasi, sync, dan reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Tinjau FiO₂ dan PEEP; consider recruitment; check untuk shunt atau V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Tinjau minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation dan perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols dan clinical judgment.

ai.label: Dukungan keputusan AI
ai.enableHint: Use online AI untuk complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture pasien pathway, usia, body metrics, dan alasan untuk support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, dan uncertain values. Ventilator pengaturan are suggested on berikutnya step dari dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support pasien is receiving when these values are measured.
oxygenAbgVentilator.timeHint: Use local date dan time untuk observation.

saveReview.description: Tinjau dan edit dataset-suggested ventilator pengaturan, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override alasan when needed, tinjau status, dan sync state.
saveReview.suggestedSettingsHint: Prefilled from the dataset using patient biodata and the current oxygen and ABG values. Edit only when the bedside decision differs.
saveReview.recommendationEmpty: Masukkan clinical values dan tap Berikutnya ke generate a dataset rekomendasi.

saveReview.recommendationNeedsClinicalInputs: Rekomendasi needs clinical alasan, SpO2, respiratory rate, dan heart rate.
saveReview.clinicianConfirmed: Clinician confirms this admission record is ready untuk simpan tinjau.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single nama–value pair. Opsional; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Nama

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs atau lainnya metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used untuk trend analysis dan pemantauan after you start session. Opsional; you can tambah points later on pemantauan screen.
